race.description: North Beach Football Club 06 Premiership Hcp (72+)
race.comment: AUTO CRUISE (8) couldn't quite get there last start when off a freshen but finished off nicely to be 0.9L away. She'll be better for that effort and CJP remains in the irons. Wouldn't surprise to see her go one better this time around. OUR MATE ARCHIE (10) comes through an easier race, but he put them to the sword there in impressive fashion. He ran a strong rating in the process and the wet deck will suit. Parnham sticks and he can give some cheek. SIMPLY THINKIN' (5) is racing well and won't be far away despite the wide draw. SNIPPY WHICH (1) can't be left out of calculations with the form he brings into this.
